text: Another HKU deal — backing Archon Robotics. Supporting university spin-offs as they scale.
At the FemTech & Women's Health Innovation Conference. Thanks for the invitation — women's health innovation is a space worth backing.
QS 2027 World University Rankings: Hong Kong lands five universities in the global top 100. Same day, I visited 腾讯教育, 深圳清华研究院 (RITS) and the GBA 国创中心.
I've waited almost a decade for a text formatter on LinkedIn. My take: a truly disruptive upgrade might one day read brain signals (BCI) to format — plus bulk tagging for people and companies.
Gobi-RIF HKUST Fund — interview with VCBeat Health (动脉网). 戈壁科大基金专访: the story behind the fund.
I'm speaking at LEAP East in Hong Kong this July — a premier tech event hosted in one of the world's most dynamic innovation hubs.
